description: You are an MEP BIM Content Creator working with the FZK-Haus residential model in Bonsai. Based on the requirements in the project brief on the desktop, add a mechanical boiler ('IfcBoiler') to the model with at least two associated connection ports ('IfcDistributionPort') for flow. Export the project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_mep_boiler.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: anti_pattern4_max_partial=55 (boiler=20, ports_unlinked=15, new_file=20), threshold=70 requires proper port nesting
